allow: PowerShell($k = [System.Environment]::GetEnvironmentVariable\("GEMINI_API_KEY", "User"\); if \($k\) { "SET: $\($k.Substring\(0,8\)\)..." } else { $k2 = [System.Environment]::GetEnvironmentVariable\("GEMINI_API_KEY", "Machine"\); if \($k2\) { "MACHINE: $\($k2.Substring\(0,8\)\)..." } else { "NOT SET" } })
